name: kaskade-monorepo
description: Kaskade - Monorepo with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend

scripts.render:build: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @kaskade/backend exec prisma generate --schema=apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @kaskade/backend exec prisma migrate deploy --schema=apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @kaskade/backend run build
